label: 区域嵌套
description: 对目标区域进行多层侵蚀生成有机轮廓，并可选用闭合样条平滑外轮廓（贝塞尔、三次样条、移动平均、高斯、折线扰动）。
description-en: Multi-layer erosion of a target region for organic shapes, with optional closed-loop spline smoothing of the outer contour (Bezier, cubic spline, moving average, Gaussian, polyline perturbation).
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。俯视嵌套色块：外层深棕地块，内层草绿有机斑块，内缘呈平滑曲线与锯齿像素对比，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 单张二维网格（grid[y][x]）；目标区域被多层侵蚀后再样条平滑。网格列表由引擎按 DataTree 自动逐张 fanout。
inputs.description-en: A single 2D grid (grid[y][x]); its target region is eroded then spline-smoothed. The engine fans out a DataTree of grids one-by-one.

inputs.name: targetValue
inputs.label: 目标区域值
inputs.description-en: Mask value of the target region.

inputs.name: erosionStrength
inputs.label: 退格程度
inputs.description: 大于 1 时按 0~100 百分点（默认 20）；≤1 时按旧版 0~1 归一化强度

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 侵蚀阶段随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳
inputs.description-en: Seed for erosion RNG; 0 uses timestamp.

inputs.name: splineAlgorithm
inputs.label: 样条算法
inputs.description: bezier=贝塞尔(Chaikin)；cubic_spline=三次样条；moving_avg=移动平均；gaussian=高斯；polyline_perturb=折线扰动
inputs.description-en: Closed-loop spline algorithm (same family as edge_spline).

inputs.name: splineSmoothness
inputs.label: 样条平滑强度
inputs.description: 1~20，与边缘样条化电池含义一致
inputs.description-en: Spline intensity (1–20), same as edge_spline smoothness.

inputs.name: splineSeed
inputs.label: 样条随机种子
inputs.description: 仅 polyline_perturb 使用；0 表示每次随机

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出网格
outputs.description: 侵蚀并经样条平滑后的单张网格；输入为网格列表时引擎逐张产出对应的 DataTree。
outputs.description-en: A single grid after erosion and spline; with a grid-list input the engine emits one per branch as a DataTree.
